parsed_review.summary: CP00-592 is a clean, descriptor-only closeout pack covering the 10 RP19 units RP19.P04.M05.S18 -> RP19.P04.M06.S05 (M05 Permission And Audit Binding tail x5, M06 Synthetic Fixture Set head x5). The live closeout-pack-plan.json entry, review baseline, manifest plan_binding_snapshot, contract projection, registry constants, validators, and tests are mutually consistent, with deviation_from_plan=false and deliverable/micro-title distributions matching the prompt (hermes_evidence:1, claude_review:1, implementation:3, ui:5). The pack-level production_ready claim is correctly NOT overclaimed: production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, implementation_layer=descriptor, and the flag is scoped to client_portal_core_p04_permission_fixture_slice_descriptor_verified, so the production gate is not weakened. No-write/no-real-data boundaries are enforced in freezeCp592Result and the CP592 no-write attestation (no product-state writes, no client portal/secure link/watermark/client review runtime, no DB/object storage, no Hermes runtime receipt, no real fixture data, no permission/audit evaluation, no leaks) and are exercised by three CP592 tests plus the contract validator's deepEqual assertions. The Claude authority boundary holds: claude_is_final_approval=false, human final approval required for runtime opening, no enterprise-trust claim from local validation; Hermes is used only as a deterministic control-plane evidence-packet descriptor, not embedded product runtime. Review-hardening preconditions are satisfied: readiness auth-preflight passed with a non-empty valid JSON result, allowed tools are Read/Grep/Glob only, forbidden_tools_present=false, source_inspection_mode=read_tools_used, prompt is 2183 bytes (under limit) and contains no full diff/source, and no auth-failure/0-byte/malformed/fenced/tool-shaped review evidence is present. The post-review artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) are legitimately absent because they are produced later in the hardened_review_sequence, not missing inputs. Unrelated dirty/untracked files are correctly preserved and excluded from pack scope, and active_untracked_implementation_files_omitted is empty. The M05 micro-title 'Permission And Audit Binding' carrying UI/closeout-flavored row titles is a faithful, program-wide projection of the source weighted ledger (sha 13c7ed65...), consistent across plan/contract/registry/tests, and is not a defect. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings. PASS; does not block pack or goal closeout. Enterprise trust claim and final approval remain a human responsibility outside this read-only review.
